heading: Disability provisions inapplicable if benefit rights impaired
label: 420 Disability provisions inapplicable if benefit rights impaired
text: None of the provisions of this subchapter relating to periods of disability shall apply in any case in which their application would result in the denial of monthly benefits or a lump-sum death payment which would otherwise be payable under this subchapter; nor shall they apply in the case of any monthly benefit or lump-sum death payment under this subchapter if such benefit or payment would be greater without their application.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 420, , as added , , relating to inapplicability of disability provisions if benefits were reduced, ceased to be in effect at the close of .
